prompt: A surreal studio portrait of a floating human head seen straight-on, centered in the frame against a vivid saturated blue sky with soft fluffy white clouds. The face is entirely obscured by a large smooth rectangular censor block in the center, covering from forehead to chin and most of the cheeks, with a subtle gradient of warm tan to muted blue-gray. Only the outer features remain visible: a close-cropped buzz cut with tight dark speckled hair texture on top, 2 visible ears, and the lower rounded chin and jaw. The head wears colorful eyeglass temples wrapping around the sides only, with no visible front lenses because the center is blocked; the left temple is pale cream with a tiny red-and-gold decorative mark, and the right temple is bright red-orange. Add 2 small rounded nubs peeking above the censor block near the top edge, one yellow on the left and one off-white on the right, creating a quirky toy-like feel. Render it as a hyperreal yet slightly uncanny 3D illustration, smooth skin, soft daylight, minimal composition, shallow depth of field, clean whimsical pop-surreal aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张超现实风格的摄影棚人像，画面主体为一个正视前方的漂浮人头，居中置于色彩浓郁的蓝天背景下，天空中点缀着柔软蓬松的白云。面部完全被一个巨大的光滑矩形审查遮挡块覆盖，遮挡范围从额头延伸至下巴及大部分脸颊，遮挡块呈现出从暖棕色到柔和蓝灰色的细微渐变。仅保留外部特征可见：修剪整齐的寸头，顶部呈现出紧密的深色斑点发质，可见双耳，以及圆润的下巴和下颌线。头部佩戴着仅包裹侧面的彩色眼镜腿，由于中心被遮挡，前方没有可见的镜片；左侧镜腿为浅奶油色，带有微小的红金装饰标记，右侧镜腿为鲜艳的红橙色。在遮挡块顶部边缘附近添加了两个露出的小圆突起，左侧为黄色，右侧为灰白色，营造出一种奇特且类似玩具的质感。渲染效果为超写实但略带诡异的 3D 插图，皮肤光滑，柔和日光，构图极简，浅景深，呈现出干净且充满奇思妙想的波普超现实美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 带有审查遮挡块的超现实漂浮头部：此提示词可生成一张极简主义波普超现实风格的 3D 人像，画面主体为一个漂浮的头部，面部被遮挡，背景为明亮的云层天空，适用于概念性编辑或实验性头像创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, lens]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
